category_sources: Official LTTng documentation and lttng-ust README identify LTTng-UST as the user-space tracing library/tracer for LTTng.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is lttng-ust; official README heading is LTTng-UST.
docs_sources: Official LTTng documentation covers LTTng-UST; official man page documents lttng-ust interfaces.
repo_sources: Official LTTng download page gives 'git clone https://git.lttng.org/lttng-ust.git'; GitHub mirror README states the official git is git.lttng.org/lttng-ust.git.
tags_sources: Official README describes user-space tracing and C/C++ application instrumentation; source_facts.description identifies Linux Trace Toolkit Next Generation Userspace Tracer.
